description: Synthetic ZIP-like file table for the contamination branch. The .log entry in the archive trips the denylist gate so the package-validator emits ARCHIVE_CONTAMINATED. The upstream Todo results are all READY in preflight-package-contaminated.json, so this is the only failure surface for that preflight scenario.

entries.name: extension/out/extension.js
entries.content:
/* synthetic bundle; not a real extension */
module.exports = { activate() {} };
